title: Highguard: Official Shutdown
objective: Survive a 3-minute shutdown sequence by dodging incoming debris, warning beams, and falling tower parts while collecting Official Seals for bonus score.

controls.outcome: Dash to the next sky lane to avoid incoming hazards.
Drop to the lower catwalk for a brief dodge window under high hazards.

controls.input: Swipe into a glowing seal token
controls.outcome: Collect an Official Seal to raise the multiplier and refill a small combo timer.

steps: The run starts on the Highguard rooftop as sirens pulse and slow drums mark the official shutdown countdown.
Hazards stream in from above and ahead: broken drones, collapsing signs, blackout beams, and falling antenna chunks.
Every 20 seconds the shutdown level rises, increasing hazard speed, mixing lane patterns, and adding tighter beam sequences.
Official Seals appear in dangerous lanes near hazards; grabbing them extends the combo and boosts the score multiplier.
Missing a seal is safe, but getting clipped by any hazard ends the run instantly and sends the final score to the local leaderboard.
scoring: Score increases by survival time plus seal pickups. Each Official Seal adds to a combo meter; as long as the meter stays alive, the multiplier climbs from x1 to x5. Seals usually spawn in riskier lanes, so the best score
tips: Swipe early; late lane changes get trapped by beam pairs.
Use the lower catwalk only to pass under high hazards, then return to center where reads are cleaner.
Chase Official Seals when the path after them is open; a broken combo costs more than one missed pickup.
Audio matters: rising siren pitch warns a fast wave, and a sharp stamp sound confirms multiplier extension.
